name: Missing Episodes
description: Scan your Jellyfin library, Sonarr, or TMDB for missing TV episodes and send them to Sonarr.
overview: Finds the gaps in your TV library with three scan sources (Jellyfin virtual items, Sonarr, TMDB) plus a gap-detection fallback, a clean per-show detail view, bulk Sonarr search, an Ignored list, scan history, live progress, and a sidebar entry.

versions.changelog:
- Progress strip now shows during a single-show rescan (it was hidden because it lived inside the list-view container).
- Click an ignored show to open its detail view; dedicated 'Remove from ignore list' button replaces the old confirm prompt.
- README updated with new features and a note about the harmless 'error occurred while getting plugin details' warning for manually-installed copies.

- Per-show rescan no longer triggers a full library scan in Jellyfin mode (was doing a full scan and returning one entry).
- Rescan now uses Sonarr's tvdbId-indexed series lookup (one call instead of a full dump) and runs under the shared progress tracker, so the UI progress strip fills in during a rescan.
- Size chip moved inside the poster — no longer overlaps the meta row.
- Smarter path reconciliation: prefer Jellyfin's path when its folder has content, fall back to Sonarr when Jellyfin's path is stale / empty.

1.0 release.
- Jellyfin-only library size summing (no Sonarr required for the size chip).
- Clear-history button.
- Rescan single show from the detail view (no full rescan needed).
- Sort by size or by completion progress.
- Prefer Sonarr's series path when available — fixes stale Jellyfin paths.
- All prior 0.2 features.
